case_title: MAUREEN D SUPER VS. JOHN TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUPER, MAUREEN D AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOHN AN IND DBA GOLDEN GATEWAY SECURITY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUPER, MAUREEN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOHN AN IND DBA GOLDEN GATEWAY SECURITY $2,346.37 PRINCIPAL, $6.83 INTEREST, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,452.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
